name: Italia Independent Group S.p.A.
summary: Italia Independent Group S.p.A. manufactures and distributes sunglasses and reading glass frames in Italy and internationally. It offers lifestyle products and eyewear under the Italia Independent brand name; and communication services through its Independent Ideas agency. The company was formerly known as LA S.r.l. Italia Independent Group S.p.A. was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Turin, Italy.
